sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants Stock Gains After Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales Jump 6% - Darden Restaurants  ( NYSE:DRI )
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants, Inc. DRI shares are trading higher in the premarket session on Thursday. The company reported that the second quarter adjusted earnings per share was $2.03, beating the street view of $2.02. Quarterly sales of $2.89 billion missed the analyst consensus estimate of $2.899 billion.

feed.title: Sonoco To Divest Business Unit To TOPPAN For $1.8 Billion, Focus On Core Packaging Businesses - Sonoco Prods  ( NYSE:SON )

feed.title: Chevron, Woodside Finalize Asset Swap In $400 Million Deal - Chevron  ( NYSE:CVX )
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation CVX and Woodside Energy Group Limited WDS finalized an asset swap deal on Wednesday. What Happened: Woodside will transfer its 13% non-operated interest in the Wheatstone Project and its 65% operated interest in the Julimar-Brunello Project in Western Australia.

feed.title: Amazon Shares Rise As Company Says Operations Remain Unaffected Despite Workers At Seven US Facilities Going On Strike Amid Peak Holiday Shopping - Amazon.com  ( NASDAQ:AMZN )
